memberdef.name: STRIDE
memberdef.initializer: LINESIZE /* The stride value should be aligned to 256*/

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the DPDMA Video example.
The purpose of this function is to illustrate how to use the XDpDma device driver in Graphics overlay mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

briefdescription.para: The purpose of this function is to initialize the application configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

briefdescription.para: The purpose of this function is to initialize the DP Subsystem (XDpDma, XAVBuf, XDpPsu)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

briefdescription.para: The purpose of this function is to setup call back functions for the DP controller interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

briefdescription.para: The purpose of this function is to generate a Graphics frame of the format RGBA8888 which generates an overlay on 1/2 of the bottom of the screen.

detaileddescription.para: This is just to illustrate the functionality of the graphics overlay.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.
is a pointer to a buffer which is going to be populated with rendered frame

simplesect.para: Returns a pointer to the frame.

briefdescription.para: This file contains a design example using the DPDMA driver (XDpDma) This example demonstrates the use of DPDMA for displaying a Graphics Overlay.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 aad 10/19/17 Initial Release 1.1 aad 02/22/18 Fixed the header
